Learn more about platforms & ecosystem in our blog at platforminnovationkit.com Why it was time to update the Platform Innovation Kit? Digital Disruption is happing now and corporates are struggling to compete in the digital economy – dominated by platforms Increased Pressure for incumbent companies Losing contact with consumers & market insights Shrinking margins for product & asset heavy companies Consumer World before Platforms World with Platforms Consumer ProducersEnablers Platforms ... and platforms not stopping to expand their dominance (Example Amazon) Amazon 1995-2000 Amazon 2019 Amazon covers with it’s offers and devices (Alexa, etc.) as Orchestrator and Realizer wide areas of our life. And increases continuously it’s B2B exposure. Consumer Cash LogisticsWeb ServicesPillpack Vehicle Space Travel Alexa Te a c h Str e e t Consumer Source: Kawohl, Krechting, 2018, www.ecosystemizer.com ... becoming an orchestrator in all life areas backed by data recocknizing our consumer needs better than any other Source: Kawohl, Krechting, 2018, www.ecosystemizer.com Amazon 2025 Life Manager using artificial intelligence Health and education orchestrator and realizer using its gigantic database Mobility orchestrator and realizer through broad collaborative networks B2B only with Amazon, Data Handling & Analysis as key production factors Strong brand that creates trust deep into the private sphere Consumer O P E Marshall Van Alstyne & Geoff Parker (MIT) Successfull companies transform from a participant in the market towards an orchestrator of the market.BUT ... We asked ourself: When platforms are so powerful, how can we utilize them to create a positive impact? We went into a redesign process to create a toolset for sustainable platform businesses with a positive impact to people, planet and profit PLATFORM INNOVATION KIT PO W E R E D B Y MADE FOR YOU Made for all the pioneers and disruptors out there. MADE FOR YOUR PLATFORM AMBITIONS Made for all who believe in the power of platforms and ecosystems to shape & create markets. MADE FOR A BETTER TOMORROW Made for all the change makers who want to shape a better tomorrow and unlock the power of platforms for a sustainable future. Established 2012 ... to support Platform Innovation worldwide 2012 INITIAL RELEASE UNDER CC 2015 5-STEP PROCESS 2017 LEAN PLATFORM INNOVATION 2019 INNOVATION PLAN & ASSESSMENT 2021 SUSTAINABILITY “create a better tomorrow” SUSTAINABLE PLATFORM BUSINESSES FOLLOW A TRIPLE BOTTOM LINE APPROACH The three pillars of John Elkington’s triple bottom line to sustainable business. PEOPLE PLANET PROFIT Sustainable Platform Businesses Platforms ... A multi-sided & sustainable business model Producers Partners Owner Plattform Consumers PLATFORM Platform (n): “A business that creates a positive impact for for it’s users, society and our planet. It operates a physical or virtual place to help two or more different groups to § find, § interact, § exchange & § co-create with each other. It combines the strengths of network engagement, data intelligence and infrastructure for long term sustainability & success. Platform Innovation Kit Team Society & Planet The Platform Innovation Kit is a visual framework and easy-to- use strategy and innovation toolset for sustainable digital platforms & ecosystems. It helps you to § Discover new platform opportunities in future ecosystems § Prototype, validate and launch § Growth hack and scale § Build a triple bottom line business § Assess the performance of an existing platform § make better strategic decisions VISUAL FRAMEWORK Visualize your team’s thinking in a structured way. STRATEGY & INNOVATION TOOLSET Build strategic relevant new business opportunities PLATFORMS & ECOSYSTEMS Optimized for multi-sided and network based businesses RIGHT STEPS & FOCUS Understand & apply best practices in building platforms step-by-step DISCOVER & IDEATE Explore inefficiencies in existing value chains and create portfolios of new business opportunities BUSINESS MODELLING Define all aspects of a business model incl. monetization strategies PROTOTYPE & VALIDATE Track and adjust the assumptions behind your Minimal Viable Platform GROWTH HACK Find effective growth hacks to improve liquidity and traction ASSESSMENT Benchmark your platform business against 20 platform best practices DECISION MAKING Align thinking among your leadership team and draw better decisions WHO IS USING THE PIK? ENTREPRENEURS & STARTUPS Structure your teams platform thinking and enable everyone to contribute. Accelerate your startup and scale existing ones. INCUMBENT COMPANIES Find new growth opportunities for your own company and define effective platform strategies by an easy to apply and effective methodology. INTRAPRENEURS & CORPORATE STARTUPS Accelerate innovation projects, validate new business ideas and achieve buy-in from decision makers across departments. INCUBATORS & ACCELERATORS Improve the success of your projects by applying an effective methodology. Get visibility of the life stages and achieve better results of your program INVESTORS Facilitate growth related discussions within portfolio companies or to accelerate and optimize the due diligence process for better investment decisions. STUDENTS & EDUCATORS We saw students using the toolkit to turn their study assignments into real startups and educators who used the toolkit in their curriculums to help students practice the theory.  WE LEARNED THAT FROM STARTUPS TO CORPORATES TO EDUCATORS – THE PIK SERVES A WIDE VARIETY OF USERS  CASES THEY APPLY THE PIK TO DISCOVER PLATFORM OPPORTUNITIES Understand & apply best practices in building platforms step-by-step asdasdsadsdasd EXECUTIVE ALIGNMENT Understand & apply best practices in building platforms step-by-step asdasdsadsdasd ENTREPRENEURIAL EDUCATION Understand & apply best practices in building platforms step-by-step asdasdsadsdasd ACCELERATE PLATFORM PROJECTS Understand & apply best practices in building platforms step-by-step asdasdsadsdasd PLATFORM & ECOSYSTEM STRATEGY Understand & apply best practices in building platforms step-by-step asdasdsadsdasd SYSTEMIZE ENTERPRISE INNOVATION Understand & apply best practices in building platforms step-by-step asdasdsadsdasd SCALE EXISTING PLATFORMS Understand & apply best practices in building platforms step-by-step asdasdsadsdasd OPTIMIZE PERFORMANCE OF YOUR PLATFORM BUSINESS Understand & apply best practices in building platforms step-by-step asdasdsadsdasd DEAL FLOW EVALUATION AND DUE DILLIGENCE Understand & apply best practices in building platforms step-by-step asdasdsadsdasd          THERE ARE MULTIPLE CASES YOU CAN APPLY THE PIK TO. Kit Introduction Advanced Tools To go beyond initial design and into full venture building Platform Value Stack Business Case & Metrics Trust & Governance IT Architecture Data Flywheel Ecosystem Strategy OVERVIEW OF THE PLATFORM INNOVATION KIT 5.0 Double Loop Framework A framework to Discover and Scale a viable platform business Core Canvases A full set of canvases to design & validate each component of your platform business model Sustainability by Design Circular economy and sustainability aspects are incorporated into the canvases to support you to design for a better tomorrow by default Advanced Tools (€) Special tools developed for deep- dives into elementary topics like network effects, trust or data four major components helping you to build digital platforms & ecosystems the right way POWERED BY Dedicated Areas for Ecosystem Impact Each canvas contains specific areas for ecosystem impact Support UN SDGs While designing platform businesses we recommend to consider the UN SDGs and select the goals you want to support with your platform Updated Guides Our newly designed online guide will support you to consider sustainability aspects while using the canvas. Sustainability by Design Alignment of 4 major perspectives Each business needs to align 4 major perspectives to create a viable business: Market, Solution, Business and Competencies Loop #1: Discover & Launch Consists of all components to Discover and Launch a platform business Loop #2: Growth & Scale Goes beyond launch helps you to scale and expand your platform into a viable platform ecosystem Double Loop Innovation FrameworkTHE DOUBLE LOOP MODEL TO DISCOVER & SCALE A SUSTAINABLE PLATFORM BUSINESS DISCOVER Context Need & Problem TEAM MARKET SOLUTION BUSINESS Competition Monetization & Market Opportunity Unfair Advantage Minimal Viable Platform Go-to-Market Strategy Governance ENTREPRENEURIAL DISCOVERY OF AN IMPACT ENTREPRENEURIAL SCALING OF THE IMPACT Growth & Liquidity Communities CULTURE ECOSYSTEM EXPERIENCE NETWORK EFFECTS Partnerships Data Infrastructure Expansion StrategyTrust Interactions LAUNCH EXPAND LOOP: DISCOVER & LAUNCH THE ENTREPRENEURIAL DISCOVERY OF AN IMPACT SUSTAINABLE PLATFORM INITIATE Context Need & Problem TEAM MARKET SOLUTION BUSINESSCompetition Monetization & Market Opportunity Unfair Advantage Minimal Viable Platform Go-to-Market Strategy Governance DISCOVER & LAUNCH § What are your impact ambitions? (3 x P) § What is your motivation? § What is the market or future ecosystem you want to shape? § What are key trends? § What is the competition? § What is your USP? § Who are the users and their needs? § How big is the inefficiency? § Why is it not solved yet? § What is your starting position? § What is the launch pad which gives you a head start? § What is the value proposition of your platform solution? § What are the key transactions? § How big is the market? § What are the monetization strategies? § How do you want to earn money? § What is the business case? § What is the cost structure? § When to become profitable? § What is your vision / mission? § How to solve chicken-egg-problem? § How will your business evolve? § How open will you be? § Who are strategic investors and strategic partners? § Who are the founders? § What are your core competencies? § How will the PoC / MVP look like? § How will you test & validate? Growth & Liquidity Communities CULTURE ECOSYSTEM EXPERIENCE NETWORK EFFECTSPartnerships Data Infrastructure Expansion Strategy Trust IGNITE & SCALE EXPAND Interactions LOOP: GROWTH & SCALE THE ENTREPRENEURIAL SCALING OF THE IMPACT SUSTAINABLE PLATFORM § How can you build trust and create a trustful environment? § How will ecosystem evolve? § Which topics will merge? § What is the competition? § What is the coopetition? § What are strategic partners? § How can you engage with your audience and build vital communities? § What are improve interactions on your platform? § How can you stimulate co- creation? § How can you further improve the on-platform or cross- platform experience? § How can you build liquidity? § How can you attract, onboard and engage your users? § What are your key network effects? § How can you stimulate network effects? § What are your expansion strategies? § How can you further expand your impact? § How can you build intelligence capabilities? § What value propositions you can create with data? § How can you evolve your organization? § How can you a culture of innovation? § What is your infrastructure and architecture strategy? § How can you integrate others? Platform Business Model Canvas One-Page platform business model canvas acts as a dashboard for all key components and can be used for platforms as well as larger ecosystems Deep-Dive Canvases Set of multiple canvases to understand and design key components and strategies in detail Interactive User-Guide All canvases are equipt with barcodes giving you acess to our online user-guide Multi-Language The canvases are available in multiple languages to support a global adoption (English, Spanish, German) Core Canvases: Set of >25 canvases LOOP #1: DISCOVER & LAUNCH THE ENTREPRENEURIAL DISCOVERY OF AN IMPACT SUSTAINABLE PLATFORM INITIATE Context Need & Problem TEAM MARKET SOLUTION BUSINESSCompetition Monetization & Market Opportunity Unfair Advantage Minimal Viable Platform Go-to-Market Strategy Governance DISCOVER & LAUNCH LOOP: GROWTH & SCALE NEW CANVASES FOR SCALING A PLATFORM Network Effects Reinforcement Engines Platform Growth Engine We went further and asked: Who can we involve into the redesign to add best in class platform expertise? OUR STRATEGIC PARTNER “We are excited to announce our strategic collaboration with AWS. We are teamed with AWS to enhance the Platform Innovation Kit based on Data Flywheel principles and Technology Architecture guiding best practices. Matthias Walter – Co-Creator Platform Innovation Kit Dedicated Tools for key aspects Advanced tools developed for key aspects of platform innovation incl. Financial modeling, IT Architecture, Network effects, ... Collaboration with leading platform experts The tools are developed in deep collaboration with leading platform experts like Amazon AWS bringing in best practices from thought leaders and practioners Tools + Guides Each advanced tool consists of specially developed canvases or other tools plus a comprehensive guide. PIK OFFERS ALL OF THAT.” Alexander Friede, Co-Founder LOVOO | Investor | Startup Coach LET’S BUILD A BETTER TOMORROW
